parameters.query: ={{ 'UPDATE fn_news_sources SET last_scraped_at = NOW() WHERE id = ' + $('Loop Sources').first().json.id }}
SELECT * FROM fn_news WHERE status = 'discovered' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM fn_news WHERE status = 'enriched' ORDER BY llm_score DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT a.*, n.url AS news_url FROM fn_articles a JOIN fn_news n ON a.news_id = n.id WHERE a.status = 'validated' LIMIT 3
INSERT INTO fn_pipeline_log (workflow_name, step, level, message, created_at) VALUES ('foronum_news_pipeline', 'complete', 'info', 'Pipeline execution completed', NOW())
